message:
feat(api): add testing/log.h to umbrella, document WASM ABI inclusion

- Add testing/log.h to umbrella header for structured test logging
- Document that abi/wasm_abi.h must be included separately for WASM
  targets (it redefines types for the ABI boundary and conflicts
  with asx_status.h when included together)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
